notes:
⚠️ ACTION REQUIRED — Update Now to Keep Chat Video Pro Working

OpenAI has discontinued GPT-4o. If you do not update, background features, including Story Cutter, memory, and assistant routing, will stop working. This update migrates CVP to newer, faster models automatically — no changes to your workflow.

What's new in V3.0.7:
• ⚡ Hardware-accelerated clips export — significantly faster clip imports into your Premiere Pro timeline
• 🛠 Fixed Grok image generation mode
• 🛠 Kling Multi-Cam now auto-downscales oversized clips — no manual resizing needed
• ✨ Documentation shortcuts added to the About panel.
